mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCP_ESIM_OMD_TRACE ( /*EsimMapper.insertMcpEsimOmdTrace */ UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO, SEQ, SUBSCRIBER_NO, GLOBAL_NO, EVENT_CODE, EID, TRTM_RSLT_SMST, PRCS_SBST, RSLT_CD, ACCESS_IP, ACCESS_URL, SYS_DT, SYS_RDATE ) VALUES ( #{uploadPhoneSrlNo}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 AS seq FROM MCP_ESIM_OMD_TRACE WHERE UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO=#{uploadPhoneSrlNo}), #{subscriberNo}, #{globalNo}, #{eventCode}, #{eid}, #{trtmRsltSmst}, #{prcsSbst}, #{rsltCd}, #{accessIp}, #{accessUrl}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT RST_CD FROM MCP_UPLOAD_PHONE_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO = #{uploadPhoneSrlNo}
